head.title: Dark Mode Live Scores Tabs - New Design

div.style: height: 600px; overflow: hidden; position: relative; width: 100%;

iframe.style: border: none; height: 650px; left: 0; position: absolute; top: -50px; width: 100%;

div.style: margin-top: 12px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; align-items: center;

div.div: PRO TIP: For best experience, use the Brave Browser.

div.style: border: 1px solid #ddd; height: 600px; overflow: hidden; position: relative; width: 100%;

iframe.style: border: none; height: 650px; left: -45px; position: absolute; top: -48px; width: calc(100% + 45px);
